recent_projects.name: jaxl-python
recent_projects.summary: Official Python SDK and CLI for interfacing with the Jaxl API. Manage calls, messages, IVRs, devices, teams, payments, campaigns, streaming transcriptions and AI Agents. Built on OpenAPI, it offers both generated API clients and Pythonic wrappers for ease of use.
